[2020-11-29 08:27] silentslayers: Vore makes going 3rd engineer very spooky because fastimus into 2x vore puts on a lot of pressure. Even if you get the forge after doing triple drone you can get put into situations where you need to buy an engineer. Even in the case where you go natural blast forge on 2 engis, the vores are amazing. After they respond natural blast to your fastimus, you open vore tarsier to force a wall. Then you can tt, and if they buy a splitter you already have a free vore hold, so you just absolutely massacre their opening. At least if vore is 1 hp you dont get free holds after forcing an absorber (in red mirror and otherwise). Basically you cant mirror and sometimes you cant go bigger versus vores. And to be clear i know that big absorbers nullify vores, im just talking about fast or medium speed sets. Fastimus on our current patch is very degenerate with smorcus, botch and vore. The 3 proposed nerfs will help greatly. Vore may lose a bit of flavour but there is no other better nerf suggested and nerf on vore is definitely good for the game

messages.author: velizar_
messages.content: freezing the absorber can't work, I'll prove that later, now I'll prove it for freezing units which aren't the absorber

threads.formatted_text:
--- Thread (1 messages, 2020-12-01) ---
[2020-12-01 13:06] velizar_ (Name): when you attack for x+y, your opponent will soak on certain units before clicking the absorber - we're assuming that the opponent plays optimally, so those are the optimal soak; if we don't freeze any of them then the opponent will still absorb on the same units, our freeze will be ignored which is as good as attacking for x; therefore our strategy will have to freeze some of those units
